result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script has:

1. Loaded all 6 survey datasets from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged all datasets using full_join by the NSID variable
3. Created age-specific sexuality variables:
   - sori19: Sexual orientation at age 19 (Wave 6)
   - sori20_w7: Sexual orientation at age 20 (Wave 7)
   - sori20_w8: Sexual orientation at age 20 (Wave 8)
   - sori32: Sexual orientation at age 32 (Wave 9)
4. Harmonized wave-specific missing codes to standard codes:
   - -9 = Refusal
   - -8 = Don't know
   - -7 = Prefer not to say
   - -1 = Item not applicable
   - -3 = Not asked at fieldwork
5. Created consolidated sexuality variable (sori) prioritizing earliest valid response
6. Converted categorical variables to factors with explicit labels
7. Output saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 cohort members and 6 columns (NSID, sori, sori19, sori20_w7, sori20_w8, sori32)
